## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or behavior change
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] Build, CI or repository tooling change
- [ ] Refactoring with no intended behavior change

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this pull request focused on one change.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior, limits or verification rules changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when code behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran the narrowest useful local checks for the changed area.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private keys, tokens, private data or credentials.
